Meta.title: Mimoo — Your identity, your belongings, their way home
Meta.description: Mimoo helps you protect what matters. Attach it to anything. If it's found, we'll help bring it back to you.

Hero.subtitle: Mimoo helps you protect what matters. Attach it to anything. If it's found, we'll help bring it back to you.
Hero.trustSubtext: trust Mimoo to protect their belongings ✨
Hero.floatingCard1Desc: ID card, wallet, keys, bag, laptop, and more.
Hero.floatingCard2Desc: Get an instant alert when someone scans your Mimoo.
Hero.floatingCard3Desc: Your information is safe and only shared when needed.

HowItWorks.title: How Mimoo works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Easy for you. Easy for others. Better for everyone.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Pick a style and create your unique identity.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Put your Mimoo tag on your important items.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: If your item is found, they scan the QR code.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: You'll receive a message safely and privately.
HowItWorks.step5Desc: Your item comes back where it belongs.

Features.title: Why Mimoo?
Features.subtitle: Not just a tracker. It's an ecosystem of care.

scan.title: Scan
scan.desc: Anyone can scan to help return your item.

connect.title: Connect
connect.desc: We connect them with your info (safely).

return.title: Return
return.desc: Your item finds its way back to you.

private.title: Private & Secure
private.desc: We only share what's needed, when it's needed.

Avatars.title: Pick Your Mimoo
Avatars.subtitle: From Sabang to Merauke, everyone has a story. Pick a character that's totally you.

ProductShowcase.title: Slim card that fits perfectly in your wallet
ProductShowcase.subtitle: Simple. Elegant. Powerful. Mimoo Card is designed to fit in your wallet or card holder.

AppPreview.title: Mimoo App
AppPreview.subtitle: Everyday peace of mind
AppPreview.feature1: Manage your items and cards easily
AppPreview.feature4: All in one simple and cozy app

CTA.title: Because losing something shouldn't mean losing hope.
CTA.subtitle: Start protecting what matters today.

Footer.tagline: Your identity, your belongings, their way home.
Footer.by: by the Mimoo team in Indonesia

HowItWorksPage.title: How Mimoo Works
HowItWorksPage.subtitle: Three simple steps: Scan → Connect → Return.
HowItWorksPage.section1Desc: Mimoo was born from a simple question: why does losing something have to feel so heartbreaking? We believe technology should ease our worries, not add to them.
HowItWorksPage.finderStep1: See a Mimoo tag on a found item
HowItWorksPage.finderStep2: Scan the QR — no app install, no signup needed
HowItWorksPage.finderStep3: Send a brief message through an anonymous form
HowItWorksPage.finderStep4: Wait for the owner's response to coordinate return

ProductsPage.title: Pick Your Mimoo
ProductsPage.subtitle: Tag, card, or sticker. All with one mission: bringing your stuff home.

card.name: Mimoo Card
card.desc: Slim card for wallets & card holders.

sticker.name: Mimoo Sticker
sticker.desc: Waterproof sticker for laptops, bottles, etc.

PricingPage.title: Free for everyone! 💜
PricingPage.subtitle: Mimoo is free forever. Because protecting what matters should be accessible to all.

free.name: All Features — Free
free.desc: No paid tiers. No hidden limits.

donation.name: Support Mimoo
donation.subtitle: Love Mimoo? Help us keep growing.
donation.desc: As a local Indonesian product, Mimoo is built to help our community. If Mimoo helps you, any support means a lot — one-time or recurring, up to you 🫶
donation.thankYou: Every contribution directly keeps Mimoo free & growing.

items.title: Made for Indonesia
items.desc: Mimoo is built to help Indonesians. Not to be an expensive commercial product.

items.title: Losing things is painful
items.desc: Mimoo should ease that, not add to it. So we open all features for free.

items.title: Community, not customers
items.desc: We believe in donations & community. If Mimoo helps you, support if you can. If not, that's okay too.

AboutPage.title: The Mimoo Story
AboutPage.subtitle: Because losing something shouldn't mean losing hope.
AboutPage.story: Mimoo was born in Indonesia, for Indonesia. We believe the best technology feels like a warm hug — safe, comfortable, and not intimidating.
AboutPage.missionDesc: Turning the experience of losing things into stories of empathetic reunion.
AboutPage.value3Desc: Designed with love for our cultural richness.

AuthForm.name: Full Name
AuthForm.passwordHelper: Min. 8 chars with uppercase, lowercase, and a number

avatarPicker.title: Pick Your Mimoo
avatarPicker.subtitle: This character will represent you on Mimoo. You can change it later!

confirmation.title: Check your email! 📬
confirmation.subtitle: We've sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click the link to activate your account.
confirmation.helper: Didn't receive it? Check spam folder or wait a few minutes.

forgotSent.title: Link sent! 💌
forgotSent.subtitle: We've sent a password reset link to {email}. Check your inbox!
forgotSent.helper: Link is valid for 1 hour. If you didn't receive it, check spam folder.

register.title: Hello, Mimoo friend! 👋
register.subtitle: Create an account to start protecting what matters.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: No worries, we'll send a reset link to your email.

resetPassword.title: Create a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password to keep your account safe.

authError.title: Oops, something went wrong 🥺
authError.subtitle: There was an issue signing you in. Please try again!

emptyState.title: Protect your first item! ✨
emptyState.description: Create your first Mimoo — attach it to anything valuable. If lost, we'll help bring it back to you.

NewItem.title: Protect a New Item
NewItem.subtitle: Takes just a few seconds. Let's go!

form.name: Item Name
form.nameHelper: Pick a name you'll recognize easily
form.namePlaceholder: e.g. Work Wallet, Driver License, College Bag
form.messageHelper: This message appears when someone scans the QR — make it warm & clear!
form.messagePlaceholder: Hi! If you found this item, please reach out to the owner. Thank you so much! 💜

ItemDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.

LostMode.title: Lost Mode
LostMode.description: Activate if your item is lost. The recovery page becomes more urgent and shows emergency contact.
LostMode.warningDesc: Contacts are encrypted and only revealed when finder clicks the button. We also log who reveals them (anti-spam).
LostMode.confirmDeactivate: Sure you want to turn off lost mode? Emergency contact will no longer appear on the recovery page.
LostMode.activeTitle: This item is marked as LOST
LostMode.activeDesc: Recovery page shows urgent mode with emergency contact. Hope your item returns soon! 🤞

Reports.title: Finder Reports
Reports.empty: No reports yet. When someone scans the QR and sends a message, they'll appear here.

Recovery.thankYou: Thanks for helping this belonging find its way home 🫶
Recovery.lostUrgentDesc: The owner is looking for this. Please help return it by contacting them below.
Recovery.contactDesc: Click below to chat directly via WhatsApp.
Recovery.notFoundDesc: Hmm, looks like this QR is no longer active or not registered with Mimoo.

FinderForm.title: Yay, you're a hero today! 💜
FinderForm.subtitle: Just send a short message. The owner will be notified instantly.
FinderForm.messagePlaceholder: Hi! I found this item at...
FinderForm.messageHelper: Tell where & how you found it
FinderForm.locationPlaceholder: e.g. 2nd floor food court Mall X, Jakarta
FinderForm.locationHelper: Help the owner picture exactly where
FinderForm.contactLabel: How the Owner Can Reach You
FinderForm.successDesc: We've notified the owner. You're kind for taking the time to help. May good karma come back to you! 🫶
